True if subscription is active and not expired"}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"proxiableUUID()":{"details":"Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier."},"recordDonationByRouter(address,uint256,uint256,uint256,string)":{"details":"Only callable by factory or authorized swap router. params.amount: The donation amount in fan tokens
params.amountOutMin: Minimum USDC to receive from swap (slippage protection)
params.token: The fan token address to pull and swap

returns.platformFee: The fee portion in fan tokens
returns.streamerAmount: The streamer portion in fan tokens

params.amount: The donation amount in fan tokens
params.amountOutMin: Minimum USDC to receive from swap (slippage protection)
params.donor: The actual donor address (for correct attribution)
params.token: The fan token address to pull and swap

returns.platformFee: The fee portion in fan tokens
returns.streamerAmount: The streamer portion in fan tokens

returns._0: bool True if subscription is active and not expired

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC-1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

recordDonationByRouter(address,uint256,u.details: Only callable by factory or authorized swap router. No token transfers      or swaps occur here â€” purely state tracking.

params.platformFee: The actual platform fee taken by the router
params.streamerAmount: The actual amount sent to the streamer
params.totalUsdcAmount: The total USDC donated (before fee split, for metrics)

params.amount: The subscription amount in fan tokens
params.amountOutMin: Minimum USDC to receive from swap (slippage protection)
params.token: The fan token address to pull and swap

returns.platformFee: The fee portion in fan tokens
returns.streamerAmount: The streamer portion in fan tokens

recordSubscriptionByRouter(address,uint2.details: Only callable by factory or authorized swap router. No token transfers      or swaps occur here â€” purely state tracking.

params.totalUsdcAmount: The total USDC amount (before fee split, for metrics)

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setSwapRouter(address).details: Factory-only. Previously the streamer (owner) could also rotate         this, which let a rogue streamer redirect `recordDonationByRouter`         / `recordSubscriptionByRouter` to a contract they control and         fabricate revenue events. Router rotation is a protocol-wide         concern and must stay with the factory.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

donate(uint256,string,uint256,uint256,ad.notice: Accept a donation with optional message

donateFor(address,uint256,string,uint256.notice: Accept a donation on behalf of a specific donor (called by factory)

getDonationAmount(address).notice: Get lifetime donation amount from a donor

getSubscription(address).notice: Get subscription details for a user

isSubscribed(address).notice: Check if a user has an active subscription

recordDonationByRouter(address,uint256,u.notice: Record a donation from the swap router (swap already completed)

recordSubscription(address,uint256,uint2.notice: Record a subscription and distribute funds

recordSubscriptionByRouter(address,uint2.notice: Record a subscription from the swap router (swap already completed)

setSwapRouter(address).notice: Set the authorized swap router address.
